title: Overlapping Time Ranges
description: Find pairs of records that have overlapping time intervals.
sql_solution: SELECT a.id id1, b.id id2 FROM events a JOIN events b ON a.id < b.id AND a.start <= b.end AND b.start <= a.end;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

result = (
    events.alias("a")
    .join(
        events.alias("b"),
        (col("a.id") < col("b.id"))
        & (col("a.start") <= col("b.end"))
        & (col("b.start") <= col("a.end")),
        "inner"
    )
    .select(col("a.id").alias("id1"), col("b.id").alias("id2"))
)
